Class ProjectRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.service.repository.ProjectRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProjectRepository
@Singleton public class ProjectRepositoryImpl extends Object implements ProjectRepository
Implementation of ProjectRepository providing project data operations. Uses Room database for data persistence and CompletableFuture for asynchronous operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    delete(Project project)
    Deletes a project from the database.
    LiveData<List<Project>>

    Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    getAllByUserId(long userId)
    Retrieves all projects for a specific user.
    LiveData<Project>
    getById(long id)
    Retrieves a project by its unique identifier.
    CompletableFuture<Project>
    save(Project project)
    Saves or updates a project in the database.

  • Method Details

    • save

      public CompletableFuture<Project> save(Project project)
      Description copied from interface: ProjectRepository
      Saves or updates a project in the database.
      Specified by:
      save in interface ProjectRepository
      Parameters:
      project - Project entity to save.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the saved Project with generated ID.

    • getById

      public LiveData<Project> getById(long id)
      Description copied from interface: ProjectRepository
      Retrieves a project by its unique identifier.
      Specified by:
      getById in interface ProjectRepository
      Parameters:
      id - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the Project, or null if not found.

      Description copied from interface: ProjectRepository
      Retrieves all projects for a specific user.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of Projects.

      Description copied from interface: ProjectRepository
      Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user.
      Specified by:
      getActiveByUserId in interface ProjectRepository
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of Projects.

    • delete

      public CompletableFuture<Void> delete(Project project)
      Description copied from interface: ProjectRepository
      Deletes a project from the database.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface ProjectRepository
      Parameters:
      project - Project entity to delete.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture that completes when deletion is finished.
